Package models

Class BankAccount

java.lang.Object
models.BankAccount
Direct Known Subclasses:
CheckingAccount, CreditCardAccount, InvestmentAccount
public class BankAccount extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BankAccount()
    Default constructor initializes account with default values.
    BankAccount(int accountNo, String accountName)
    Constructor to initialize a bank account with an account number and name.
    BankAccount(int accountNo, String accountName, String status)
    Constructor to initialize a bank account with a specified status.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Closes the account if there is no remaining balance.

    Deposits a specified amount into the account.

    Sets the account status.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a string line of the bank account.
    void
    transferMoney(int recipientAccNo, double amount, BankAccount[] bankAccounts)
    Transfers money to another account if the target account exists and there is sufficient balance.
    void
    withdraw(double amount)
    Withdraws a specified amount from the account if sufficient balance exists.

  • Constructor Details

    • BankAccount

      public BankAccount()
      Default constructor initializes account with default values.

    • BankAccount

      public BankAccount(int accountNo, String accountName)
      Constructor to initialize a bank account with an account number and name. Balance is initialized to 0.0 and status is set to active.
      Parameters:
      accountNo - The account number
      accountName - The account holder's name

    • BankAccount

      public BankAccount(int accountNo, String accountName, String status)
      Constructor to initialize a bank account with a specified status.
      Parameters:
      accountNo - The unique account number.
      accountName - The account holder's name.
      status - The initial status of the account.

  • Method Details

    • setAccountNo

      public void setAccountNo(int accountNo)
      Sets the account number.
      Parameters:
      accountNo - The unique account number to be assigned.

    • getAccountNo

      public int getAccountNo()
      Gets the account number.
      Returns:
      The account number.

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the account status.
      Parameters:
      status - The status of the account (Active or Closed).

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Gets the current account status.
      Returns:
      The status of the account (Active or Closed).

    • setAccountName

      public void setAccountName(String accountName)
      Sets the account holder's name.
      Parameters:
      accountName - The name of the account holder.

    • getAccountName

      public String getAccountName()
      Gets the account holder's name.
      Returns:
      The name of the account holder.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string line of the bank account.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A formatted string displaying account information.

    • deposit

      public void deposit(double amount)
      Deposits a specified amount into the account. 1. Add the deposit amount to the current balance. 2. Display a confirmation message.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to deposit.

    • withdraw

      public void withdraw(double amount)
      Withdraws a specified amount from the account if sufficient balance exists. 1. Check if balance is greater than or equal to the withdrawal amount. 2. If true, deduct the amount from balance and display success message. 3. If false, display an error message.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to withdraw.

    • inquireBalance

      public double inquireBalance()
      Displays the current balance of the account. Returns the account balance.
      Returns:
      The account balance.

    • transferMoney

      public void transferMoney(int recipientAccNo, double amount, BankAccount[] bankAccounts)
      Transfers money to another account if the target account exists and there is sufficient balance. 1. Check if the target account exists in the list and is active. 2. If found, check if the balance is sufficient. 3. If true, deduct the amount and add it to the recipient's balance. 4. Otherwise, display an appropriate error message.
      Parameters:
      recipientAccNo - The recipient's account number.
      amount - The amount to transfer.
      bankAccounts - The list of available bank accounts.

    • closeAccount

      public void closeAccount()
      Closes the account if there is no remaining balance. 1. Check if balance is greater than 0. 2. If true, request user to withdraw remaining balance first. 3. If false, change account status to "Closed" and confirm closure.
